name_cn:
Genuine quality
New version: 5BB142, Miu Miu new bowling bag, official flagship, this year's absolute hit🔥 style, top-grade imported lambskin, Miu Miu's unique Matelasse pattern, exquisite and structured body, front engraved logo echoes the leather color, detachable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap, cotton satin lining, with zippered pocket, many celebrities and influencers' same style, size 22X10.5X7.5Cm, comes with original packaging
